faq.answer: For most patients, we recommend a professional cleaning and exam every six months. However, if you have gum disease or other risk factors, Dr. Alex may suggest more frequent visits, such as every three to four months, to keep your oral health on track.
faq.question: How often should I get a dental cleaning?

faq.answer: Yes. Digital X-rays use up to 80% less radiation than traditional film X-rays, making them very safe for routine use. We also use protective lead aprons and take X-rays only when clinically necessary.
faq.question: Are digital X-rays safe?

faq.answer: Most dental insurance plans cover two preventive cleanings and exams per year at little to no out-of-pocket cost. Our team will verify your benefits and explain your coverage before your appointment. Call us at (718) 555-0234 if you have any questions about your plan.
faq.question: Will my insurance cover cleanings and exams?

faq.answer: There is no need to feel embarrassed — we welcome patients at every stage. Our goal is to help you feel comfortable and get back on track.
faq.question: What if it has been a long time since my last dental visit?

title: Cleanings & Comprehensive Exams
benefits: Early detection of cavities, gum disease, and oral health issues
Removal of plaque and tartar buildup to prevent decay
Low-radiation digital X-rays for safe, detailed imaging
Fresher breath and a brighter, polished smile
subtitle: The foundation of a healthy smile
whatToExpect: Your appointment will begin with a friendly greeting from our front desk team. A dental hygienist will take any necessary digital X-rays before performing a thorough cleaning that includes scaling, polishing, and flossing. Dr. Alex will then conduct a comprehensive exam, reviewing your X-rays on a chairside monitor and checking every tooth, your gum health, bite alignment, and soft tissues. We will discuss any findings with you in straightforward language, answer your questions, and outline any recommended next steps. Most patients find the entire visit comfortable and stress-free.
fullDescription:
Regular dental cleanings and comprehensive exams are the cornerstone of preventive dentistry. At our Flushing, NY practice, we recommend visiting us every six months to maintain optimal oral health, catch potential issues early, and keep your teeth looking their best.

During your visit, our skilled dental hygienists will thoroughly remove plaque and tartar buildup that regular brushing and flossing cannot reach. We use advanced ultrasonic scalers and hand instruments to clean above and below the gumline, followed by a professional polish that leaves your teeth smooth and refreshed.

Your comprehensive exam includes a thorough evaluation of your teeth, gums, bite, jaw joints, and oral soft tissues. We utilize state-of-the-art digital X-rays, which emit up to 80% less radiation than traditional film X-rays, to detect cavities, bone loss, and other concerns that are not visible to the naked eye. Dr. Alex will review all findings with you and develop a personalized treatment plan tailored to your unique needs.
shortDescription: Professional dental cleanings, comprehensive oral exams, and digital X-rays to keep your smile healthy and bright.
